candidate_case_sets_considered.name: fresh_fixed_held_out_slice_if_available
candidate_case_sets_considered.source: not available in current offline artifacts

reason_for_chosen_set: Balances generalization, paired baseline availability, and bounded call budget while avoiding overfitting to the 15-case integrated pilot.
abort_conditions: prompt materialization or no-gold validation fails
external baseline rows missing for selected case ids
parse ambiguity or API error rate exceeds 10% in first 10 calls
scoring_plan: Primary: paired exact-match accuracy delta vs external_l1_max on identical case IDs.
Secondary: improved_over_current_pal rate and mechanism-stratified outcomes.
Track structural_commit_only as zero-extra-call fixed/not-fixed from integrated outputs.
statistical_tests_plan: McNemar test on discordant pairs when sample size permits.
Bootstrap CI over paired accuracy delta (>=2000 resamples) when practical.
caveats: Current recommendation is staged; this bundle is readiness only (no calls made).
Stage-1 set partially overlaps known-loss mechanisms and partially includes non-loss generalization cases.
Targeted-retry should remain allowlisted to tested prompt-family coverage initially.
Fresh held-out fixed slice is not yet materialized in existing artifacts.
